title: The Ultimate Solopreneur Agent Harness for AI Builders (Claude Code Harness)
summary: Ron Demerit built a "Solopreneur Rig" harness for Claude Code featuring 16 specialized sub-agents, a product manager orchestrator, and session locking for multi-client isolation. The framework enables dynamic model routing across Opus, Sonnet, and Haiku based on task requirements and was used to build three applications: Canta Conmigo (Spanish music learning), a native macOS Whisper transcription tool, and Hermit Host (self-hosted Netlify alternative).
